VAL-SYNC-001.evidence: grep -c 'SAFETY' system/kernel/sync.rs => 5 (exit code 0). Meets threshold of >= 5. All 5 unsafe sites in sync.rs have SAFETY comments covering ticket spinlock, IRQ masking via DAIF, and unsafe impl Sync.

VAL-SYNC-002.evidence: git diff origin/main -- system/kernel/futex.rs system/kernel/waitable.rs (exit code 0). Both files show AUDIT comments dated 2026-03-11 with 6-category checklist applied. futex.rs: two-phase lock ordering verified, lost-wakeup prevention via wake_pending flag confirmed sound, swap_remove index management correct, thread cleanup scans all 64 buckets, 0 bugs found. waitable.rs: O(1) indexed registry correct, create/destroy/notify lifecycle sound, level-triggered and edge-triggered patterns verified, register_waiter overwrite behavior acceptable, 0 bugs found.

VAL-SYNC-003.evidence: git diff origin/main -- system/kernel/channel.rs system/kernel/handle.rs (exit code 0). Both files show AUDIT comments dated 2026-03-11. channel.rs: found and fixed closed_count saturation bug (redundant close_endpoint could exceed 2, risking double-free). Added early-return guard. Close-while-blocked-reader race verified correct via two-phase wake pattern. Lock ordering (channel → scheduler) verified. handle.rs: pure safe Rust, handle lifecycle verified (create/close/use-after-close/double-close), fixed 256 slots with TableFull error, per-process table under scheduler lock eliminates data races, drain iterator correct, 0 bugs found.
